visual_description: A dimly lit interior shows a man in profile with dark hair looking forward, while another person is partially visible in the foreground. The camera then cuts to a clock on a wall, its face illuminated against the darkness, before shifting to an outdoor night scene where two men descend a staircase under a covered walkway. One man wears a dark suit and the other has white hair; they walk side by side past a metal railing, with streetlights visible in the background.
